title: Approach, My Soul, the Mercy Seat

verses.text: Approach, my soul, the mercy seat where Jesus answers prayer; there humbly fall before his feet, for none can perish there. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission
Thy promise is my only plea; with this I venture nigh: thou callest burdened souls to thee, and such, O Lord, am I. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission
Bowed down beneath a load of sin, by Satan sorely pressed, by war without and fears within, I come to thee for rest. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission
Be thou my shield and hiding place, that, sheltered near thy side, I may my fierce accuser face, and tell him thou hast died. Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission
O wondrous love! to bleed and die, to bear the cross and shame, that guilty sinners, such as I, might plead thy gracious name! Trinity Psalter Hymnal, 2018, used by permission
